scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/playzone-bar run build && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.build:full: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run build:workspaces
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:full: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server --filter @workspace/playzone-bar run typecheck
